metadata.title: Project Truth — Illuminate What's Hidden
metadata.description: Open-source 3D network visualization platform for investigative journalism. Map relationships, verify evidence, protect sources.

hero.title: See What Power Hides
hero.subtitle: The open-source investigation platform that maps hidden networks, verifies evidence with collective intelligence, and protects those who expose the truth.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.label: WHY THIS EXISTS
problem.statement: Documents scattered. Connections hidden. Investigators alone.
problem.col1Text: Complex networks of power, money, and influence hide behind fragmented data. Individual facts exist — but the connections between them remain invisible.
problem.col2Text: Court records, flight logs, financial filings, witness testimonies — critical evidence is spread across thousands of sources with no unified view.
problem.col3Text: Journalists, researchers, and citizens work in silos. Discoveries made by one remain unknown to others investigating the same networks.
problem.scene1Big: documents exposed in the Epstein case alone.
problem.scene1Sub: No single person could read them all. The connections remain buried.
problem.scene2Big: What if every connection was visible?
problem.scene2Sub: Red threads emerge. Patterns surface. The network reveals itself.
problem.scene3Big: This is what Project Truth does.
problem.scene3Sub: From chaos to clarity. Every node a person. Every thread a verified connection.

scrollytelling.label: EXPERIENCE
scrollytelling.step1Text: Every node is a person, organization, or event. Positioned by their proximity to power.
scrollytelling.step2Text: Court records, financial trails, testimonies — each link carries verified evidence metadata.
scrollytelling.step3Text: Click any node to reveal documents, relationships, and the full evidence chain.
scrollytelling.step4Title: See what kind of evidence exists
scrollytelling.step4Text: The epistemological layer reveals evidence types, confidence levels, and source quality — at a glance.

features.title: Built for Truth-Seekers
features.label: CAPABILITIES
features.f1Text: Dead Man Switch with Shamir's Secret Sharing. Your encryption key splits into fragments, distributed across trusted guardians. If you go silent — the key reassembles, documents release, and the world is notified.
features.f1Detail1Text: Set your check-in interval. Miss it, and the system begins the alarm cascade.
features.f1Detail2Text: Your key splits into N fragments. M-of-N must combine to decrypt. No single person can access your files alone.
features.f1Detail3Text: Silent → Yellow → Red. Guarantors verify before full activation. No false positives.
features.f1Quote: Silence one journalist, and the documents reach thousands.
features.f2Subtitle: Every connection tells you how much to trust it
features.f2Text: Live cables pulse with evidence. Color shows evidence type. Brightness shows confidence. Pulse speed shows evidence density. At a glance, you see what's proven and what's alleged.
features.f2Detail1Text: Court records, financial documents, leaked files, testimonies — each type carries different weight.
features.f2Detail2Text: 0-100% confidence based on source hierarchy. Primary sources score highest.
features.f2Detail3Text: Primary → Secondary → Tertiary. A court ruling outweighs a social media claim.
features.f3Text: Propose connections, submit evidence, vote on findings. The reputation system ensures accountability — stake your reputation on your claims, earn trust through accuracy.
features.f3Detail1Text: Put your reputation on the line. Correct submissions earn rewards. False claims get slashed.
features.f3Detail2Text: No data enters the network without independent verification. The investigator who scans a document cannot approve their own findings.
features.f3Detail3Text: All AI-extracted data is quarantined until verified by the community. Zero hallucinations in the network.

trust.title: Why You Can Trust This
trust.label: TRUST ARCHITECTURE
trust.layer1Text: AI extractions cannot enter the network without independent human verification.
trust.layer2Text: The person who scans a document cannot approve their own findings.
trust.layer3Text: Every change, every vote, every promotion — permanently recorded and traceable.
trust.layer4Text: AGPL-3.0. Read every line. Audit every algorithm. No black boxes.

liveStats.label: LIVE PLATFORM METRICS
liveStats.title: Real Data. Real Evidence. Right Now.
liveStats.tagline: Every number represents a verified piece of truth entering the network.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.label: METHODOLOGY
howItWorks.subtitle: From raw data to living intelligence network
howItWorks.step1Text: Nodes represent people, organizations, places, and events. Each positioned by their role and proximity to power.
howItWorks.step2Text: Every connection carries evidence metadata — court records, financial documents, testimonies. Confidence levels and source hierarchy visible at a glance.
howItWorks.step3Text: Community members contribute evidence, propose new connections, and vote on findings. Reputation staking ensures accountability.
howItWorks.step4Text: Dead Man Switch, metadata stripping, anonymous uploads. Built-in journalist protection from day one.

mechanics.step1Text: They set a check-in interval — every 12 hours, every day, whatever they choose. Each check-in is a signal: I'm still here. I'm still free. The system watches. As long as the signal continues, nothing happens.
mechanics.step2Title: Their encryption key shatters into fragments.
mechanics.step2Text: The moment the shield activates, the encryption key protecting their documents splits into six pieces using Shamir's Secret Sharing. Each piece goes to a different trusted guardian. No single person — not even the journalist, not even the system itself — can access the documents alone. Four of six must combine.
mechanics.step3Title: The signal stops. The cascade begins.
mechanics.step3Text: First, a silent alarm to guarantors — they check if something's wrong. Then yellow: wider circle notified. Then red. The key fragments reassemble. The documents release. The entire network is alerted. By the time the attacker realizes what happened, it's already too late.

truthBridge.line1: We built a shield for those who expose the truth.
truthBridge.line2: But truth doesn't survive on protection alone.
truthBridge.question: Who decides what's real and what's fabrication?

epistemology.label: THE EVIDENCE LAYER
epistemology.intro: Every connection in the network carries a weight of truth.
epistemology.courtDesc: Official documents. Filed under oath. Verifiable at the source.
epistemology.leakedDesc: Internal records that weren't meant to see daylight. Authenticated, cross-referenced.
epistemology.financeDesc: Money doesn't lie. Bank records, wire transfers, shell companies. Follow the money.
epistemology.testimonyDesc: Witnesses speak. Some under oath, some anonymously. Every word weighed against evidence.
epistemology.unverifiedDesc: The fog. Social media posts, anonymous tips, rumors. They stay here until evidence arrives.
epistemology.closing: You see the difference. The network shows it. Every wire, every color, every pulse — it's evidence you can verify yourself.

community.label: THIS CONCERNS ALL OF US
community.headline: Truth can't stand alone.
community.subheadline: It needs people who refuse to look away.
community.role1Desc: Reads the indictment. Finds what doesn't add up. Flags the gaps the rest of us miss.
community.role2Desc: Follows the money. Maps the shell companies. Traces the wire transfers that connect the dots.
community.role3Desc: Digs where others won't. Uploads documents. Uses the shield. Tells the story.
community.role4Desc: Says 'this is wrong.' Verifies a claim. Votes on evidence. Turns silence into signal.
community.manifesto: Every verification strengthens the network. Every contribution writes history. Every person who shines light on truth takes their place on the right side of history.
community.finalNote: Free. Open source. Built for humanity.

shield.label: JOURNALIST SHIELD PROTOCOL
shield.proofOfLife: Every journalist in our network sends a signal.
shield.youActivated: You just released everything they had.
shield.explanation: The encryption key was already split. The guardians were already watching. The documents were already distributed. You just activated the protocol that ensures the truth gets out.
shield.era: The era of silencing journalists is over.

bridge.msg1: I found the connection. The foundation received $2.3M from three shell companies — all registered the same week the investigation was dropped.
bridge.question: What if their evidence could never be silenced?

openSource.title: Open Source. Auditable. Yours.
openSource.text: Project Truth is built in the open because a platform claiming to reveal truth cannot hide its own workings.

footer.mission: Mapping truth, one connection at a time.

hero.title: See the Connections
hero.subtitle: An open-source platform built to map hidden networks, verify evidence through collective intelligence, and stand with those who bring the truth to light.

meaning.label: WHAT YOU CAN DO
meaning.title: From scattered evidence to visible connections
meaning.seeText: Interactive 3D visualization reveals hidden connections between people, organizations, and events. What was invisible becomes obvious.
meaning.scanText: AI-powered document analysis extracts entities from court records, financial filings, and leaked documents. Every claim linked to its source.
meaning.verifyText: No data enters the network unverified. Community peer review ensures precision over speed. Wrong information is worse than missing information.

trust.manifesto: No data enters the network without verification. Precision over speed. Silence over falsehood.

chat.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

documents.noDocuments: No documents in this network yet. Upload documents using the upload button above.
documents.externalDataWarning: External source data • Upload the actual document from MY DOCUMENTS to add to network
documents.researchDeskInfo: Search external sources here and save results to your research notebook. To add data to the network, upload real documents from the MY DOCUMENTS tab.

quarantine.title: QUARANTINE ZONE
quarantine.empty: No quarantine data for this document yet
quarantine.emptyHint: Scan the document to see extracted data here
quarantine.alreadyReviewed: You have already reviewed this item

upload.title: DOCUMENT UPLOAD SYSTEM
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop a PDF or image file
upload.orClick: or click to select · Max 50MB · PDF, JPEG, PNG, WebP, TIFF
upload.viewInstruction: Inspect the document. Make sure it is a real {fileType}. When ready, proceed to OCR.
upload.ocrInstruction: OCR will extract all text from the document.
upload.ocrPdfNote: If PDF has a text layer, fast extraction is used; otherwise pages are scanned with OCR.
upload.ocrImageNote: Image will be scanned with Tesseract.js (Turkish + English).
upload.aiAnalyzingDesc: Groq AI is extracting people, organizations and relationships from the document.
upload.scanComplete: SCAN COMPLETE — Results sent to quarantine
upload.quarantineNote: All extracted data has been sent to QUARANTINE. An independent user must verify before adding to network.

taskCard.reasoningPlaceholder: Why is this entity correct/incorrect? What is your basis?
taskCard.reasoningTooShort: Reasoning must be at least 10 characters — transparency is required.

noTasks.title: All tasks completed!
noTasks.description: You've reviewed all tasks or new tasks need to be generated.

transparency.title: PLATFORM METRICS — PUBLIC
transparency.noteText: All platform metrics are public. No hidden data. Trust weight formula, consensus calculation, and tier upgrade rules can be audited by anyone. Don't trust us, verify.

disputes.title: Dispute System
disputes.description: You can create a dispute by pressing the "DISPUTE" button during task review. All disputes are public and subject to independent review.

auth.magicLinkDesc: A passwordless login link will be sent to your email.
auth.magicLinkSentDesc: A login link has been sent to your email. Check your inbox.
auth.magicLinkSpam: Don't forget to check your spam folder.
auth.privacyNotice: Real name is not required. ProtonMail and anonymous email services are accepted. The platform does not share user data with third parties.
auth.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

rights.title: INDIVIDUAL RIGHTS
rights.disclaimer: Inclusion on this platform does not indicate guilt. All individuals are presumed innocent until convicted.
rights.slaNotice: Requests are processed within the applicable SLA period.
rights.gdprNotice: GDPR Article 17 removal requests are processed within 30 days.

optOut.title: Request Removal
optOut.description: If you are a survivor represented on this platform, you have the right to request removal, anonymization, or restriction of your data.
optOut.success: Your request has been received and will be reviewed within 48 hours.
optOut.error: There was an error submitting your request. Please try again.

warning.extreme: This section contains detailed descriptions of sexual abuse, trafficking, or exploitation. This content may be deeply distressing.
warning.severe: This section references abuse, trafficking, or exploitation. Sensitive details are included.
warning.moderate: This section involves a survivor or victim. Content is presented with care.
warning.mild: This content includes references to victims or survivors.
warning.skipSession: Don't show warnings for this session

archive.summaryRedacted: This individual is a protected survivor. Details are restricted to protect their privacy and safety.
archive.evidenceRestricted: Evidence details are restricted for this protected individual.
archive.connectionNote: This connection involves a protected survivor. Limited details are shown.

consent.headline: Honest pseudonymity.
consent.body: We recognize your device to maintain your reputation — but we don't know who you are. No tracking cookies. No ads. No personal data collection.
consent.detail: Your fingerprint hash enables reputation continuity. For full anonymity, use Tor.

networkDisclaimer.text: Inclusion on this platform does not indicate guilt. All connections are based on public records and community-verified evidence. All individuals are presumed innocent until proven guilty in a court of law.
networkDisclaimer.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated analyses may contain errors and do not constitute legal findings. Always verify through independent sources.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.corePromise: We know your device, not you. Project Truth is built on a principle of honest pseudonymity — we are transparent about what we collect and what we don't. We will never claim to offer more privacy than we can technically guarantee.

identity.title: Our Identity Model
identity.intro: Project Truth uses a three-layer identity model. We are honest about each layer:
identity.honestNote: Important: While we do not log IP addresses, our infrastructure providers (Vercel, Cloudflare) may retain server logs that include IP addresses. For maximum anonymity, we recommend using Tor or a VPN.

collect.title: What We Collect
collect.intro: We collect only what is necessary for the platform to function:

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: We use the following services. Your data may pass through them:
thirdParty.honestNote: We are working toward Zero Data Retention agreements with all providers. Until then, we are transparent that your AI queries pass through Groq's servers.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.text: Project Truth does not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics cookies. We use only essential cookies required for authentication sessions (if you register). The fingerprint hash is stored in your browser's local storage for reputation continuity — this is not a tracking cookie.

yourRights.title: Your Rights (GDPR & Global)
yourRights.intro: Regardless of where you live, you have the following rights:
yourRights.accessHow: Email us or use the in-platform rights request form
yourRights.correctionHow: Submit a correction request through the platform
yourRights.deletionHow: Request full deletion — fingerprint hash destroyed
yourRights.exportHow: Request a machine-readable export of all your data

transparency.title: Infrastructure Transparency
transparency.text: We are hosted on Vercel (US), with database on Supabase (US/EU), AI processing on Groq (US), and document processing on Google Cloud (US). We are a Sweden-based organization (ideell förening) subject to Swedish and EU privacy law. We commit to publishing quarterly transparency reports detailing: how many data requests we received, how many we fulfilled, and whether we had data to provide.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.text: Project Truth is not intended for children under 16. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you believe a minor has provided data to us, please contact us immediately and we will delete it.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We will notify registered users of material changes via email. For anonymous users, changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. We will never retroactively weaken privacy protections.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For any privacy-related questions, concerns, or rights requests:

whatWeAre.title: What This Platform Is
whatWeAre.text1: Project Truth is an open-source research infrastructure platform that visualizes publicly documented connections between entities (persons, organizations, events). It is a tool for collective investigation, built by and for the public.
whatWeAre.text2: Think of us as a search engine for relationships — we point to public records, court documents, and verified evidence. We do not create the information; we help organize and visualize what already exists in the public domain.

whatWeAreNot.title: What This Platform Is NOT
whatWeAreNot.text: Project Truth is not a court, not a prosecutor, and not a publisher. We do not make accusations, determine guilt, or pass judgment. The platform is infrastructure — like the postal service, we facilitate the flow of information, but the content is contributed and verified by the community.
whatWeAreNot.disclaimer: Inclusion of any individual or organization on this platform does not indicate guilt, wrongdoing, or criminal activity. All individuals are presumed innocent. Documented connections represent relationships found in public records, not allegations of misconduct.

legalLanguage.title: Safe Legal Language
legalLanguage.text: The platform uses careful, legally precise language. We say 'documented connection' not 'accomplice'. We say 'appears in court records' not 'is guilty'. We say 'linked in financial records' not 'co-conspirator'. AI-generated labels are marked as 'AI analysis' and are always subject to community verification. No automated system on this platform makes final determinations about any individual.

conduct.title: User Conduct
conduct.text: You agree not to use this platform to harass, doxx, or target individuals. You agree not to submit deliberately false information. You agree not to use the platform's data to cause harm to any person. Violations may result in reputation penalties, tier demotion, or account restriction. The platform reserves the right to remove content that violates these principles.

contributions.title: Community Contributions
contributions.text1: When you contribute evidence, verify data, or participate in investigations, your contributions pass through a quarantine and peer-review process before entering the network. Verified information becomes part of the public commons — it belongs to the community, not to any individual contributor (Galileo Principle).
contributions.text2: You retain the right to delete your identity and pseudonymous profile at any time. However, verified factual contributions that have been confirmed by multiple independent reviewers remain as anonymized public knowledge.

license.title: Open Source License
license.text: Project Truth is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0). This means the source code is freely available, and any modifications must also be shared under the same license. This ensures the platform can never be captured by a single entity.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.text: This platform is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any information displayed. AI-generated analysis may contain errors. Community-verified data reflects the consensus of contributors, not absolute truth. Always verify critical information through independent sources.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.text: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Project Truth, its contributors, and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you have paid to use the platform (which is zero, as this is a free, open-source service).

individualRights.title: Individual Rights
individualRights.text: Any person or organization represented on this platform has the right to: request correction of inaccurate information, request removal (subject to public interest balancing), request context addition, report false accusations, and update legal status (e.g., acquittal, case dismissal). These requests are processed through our rights request system with documented SLA commitments. See our Privacy Policy for full details.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.text: We may update these terms as the platform evolves. Material changes will be announced on the platform and communicated to registered users. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For legal inquiries, rights requests, or questions about these terms:
